ueen
Though a person may not be well-versed in astronomic calcula-
tions, yet he can become famous and a favourite of monarchs, if
he observes (and understands the significance of) the portents care-
fully. Thus have I explained this secret (of portents) taught by the
Sages, by knowing which man can look into the past, present and
future.
[In the case of omens etc. intuition plays an important role.
In astrology mere knowledge of astronomy and an intellectual grasp
of the astrological principles would not be sufficient for predicting
correctly one's past, present and future.
